17 = Walk-in Retail Health Clinic. A walk-in health clinic, other than an office, urgent care facility, 
pharmacy or independent clinic and not described by any other Place of Service code, that is 
located within a retail operation and provides, on an ambulatory basis, preventive and primary 
care services.
